title: FOIA - US Navy records ompf Mr. Doyle

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for Eric Doyle
Request copy of history of assignments NAVPERS form 1070/605, Legion of Merit award citations, Meritorious Service medal citation, Bronze star medal citations, Navy Commendation medal citations, Air Medal award citations, all award citations, Cumulative Record of Training (NAVPERS Form 5300/16), Adminstrative remarks NAVPERS 1070/613, dates of ranks.
Please redact any personal information per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(3) or 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).

VETERAN INFORMATION
Name of veteran: Eric Doyle
Branch of service: United States Navy
Rank: Captain O-6
Service: approx 1996 to 2021
https://web.archive.org/web/20260418192612/https://myusna.com/events/36130

VFA) 125, VFA-115 , TOPGUN, VFA-37, VFA-15, 422nd Test & Evaluation Squadron, VFA- 113 , Blue Angels

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: FOIA US Navy records 4-17 Vietnam War

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA US Navy records 4-17 Vietnam War
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Michael D. Nolan
Branch: United States Navy
DOB: October 13, 1947

Dates of Service: Approx 1966 to 1975

1) Bronze Star Medal award citation 
2) History of Assignments NAVPERS form 601-5
3) cumulative Navy Occupational training history NAVPERS 601-4 and 1070/604,
4)  military education and courses
5) Navy commendation medal award citation

Historical Documentation, Vietnam War history

I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:

MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley
